arts.ttl: Man City and Real Madrid got what they wanted but now face new Champions League playoff problem
arts.sum: The world is not enough for the two superpowers, who have dominated European football for the past half-decade but still insist on trying to bend everything to their will via legal challenges

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Real Madrid – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City host Champions League holders Real Madrid in the first leg of their playoff tie tonight. The team that prevails over two legs will earn a spot in the last 16 of the competition with the losers eliminated. City prevented an early exit in the league phase by beating Club Brugge in their final […] The post Manchester City vs Real Madrid – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: Whoever wins our play-off with City will win Champions League
arts.sum: Real Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti has laid down a marker to their Champions League rivals by saying whoever wins their play-off tie with Manchester City will lift the trophy in May.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham Breaks La Liga Rule in Every Real Madrid Game
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham is breaking a little-known rule in every La Liga game he plays, but he hasn't been punished for his actions yet.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star responds to WORLD RECORD Real Madrid offer
arts.sum: During Arsenal's recent trip to Dubai, a Gunners fan begged Saliba not to join Real Madrid this summer. Real Madrid have reportedly made a record-breaking move for William Saliba, and the Arsenal star defender has not ruled out a transfer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star is keen on leaving with Real Madrid named as his ‘dream’ club
arts.sum: One of Arsenal’s best players is attracting interest from Real Madrid with the player open to a move to the La Liga champions. The Gunners have challenged for the Premier League title for the last two seasons but on both occasions, they have lost out to Pep Guardiola’s Manchester City side. arts.ttl: Report: What William Saliba privately thinks about joining Real Madrid after Arsenal set £100m price tag
Man City vs. Real Madrid exclusive: Club legend claims Pep Guardiola's side "can win" Champions League tie on one condition
arts.sum: Manchester City "can win" against Real Madrid in the Champions League playoffs as long as they "cut the mistakes out", club legend Shaun Wright-Phillips tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold latest: Could Conor Bradley replace Liverpool right-back if Real Madrid sign defender on free transfer?
arts.sum: Conor Bradley should come into consideration as a replacement for Trent Alexander-Arnold should the right-back leave the club in the summer amidst Real Madrid's interest.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Real Madrid winner decided with Champions League big-hitters facing issues
arts.sum: THE BIG DEBATE: Manchester City vs Real Madrid is the most eye-catching tie of the Champions League play-off round, and Mirror Football's writers have given their predictions
